title: Formation and Management of Cracking Clay Soils (Vertisols) to Enhance Crop Productivity
abstract:
Cracking clay soils (Vertisols and their intergrades) [Soil Survey Staff 2006] are
important natural resources in a wide range of climatic zones, from humid tropical to
arid dry areas of the world [Ahmad 1996]. The natural vegetation of these areas is dry
deciduous forest. However, most of the soils are now under cultivation. Soils of these
climates have a significant role in the agricultural resource inventory of countries
such as Australia, India, the Caribbean Islands,...............
